untranslatable_reason: This rule is a philosophy/strategy framework statement describing win rate, expectancy, and market diversification targets—not a specific position sizing method. Entry conditions (win rate ≥45%, expectancy ≥$1.25/$1 risked, 4-6 markets) are filters that qualify trades, not sizing rules. The parameters describe trade frequency and cost allowance, not how to scale position size. No sizing method (R-multiple, Kelly, volatility scaling, etc.) is specified.
